response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of professional C/C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) plus a bachelor-thesis project, falling far short of the 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows required. There is no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience, and no SQL Server or Oracle exposure. The career has been focused on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/GIS platforms, which does not align with the role's mandatory requirements.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with strong testing/TDD discipline
Comfortable across multiple languages and able to pick the right tool for the job
Some low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (Sociomantic data integration)
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ on Windows; C/C++ exposure is minimal and over a decade old
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
